name: Basil Avocado Chutney
recipeIngredient: 2 cups packed basil leaves (washed and spun dry)
2 teaspoons fresh lemon juice, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, blend the basil, almonds, garlic, and lemon juice together, pulsing the motor once or twice until the almonds are finely ground.
2. Add the chopped avocado and salt to taste, then blend the mixture until it is well combined.
3. Serve the chutney with grilled meats and fish. Makes about 1 1/2 cups.
